nasb.text: It happened as they were coming, when David returned from killing the Philistine, that the women came out of all the cities of Israel, singing and dancing, to meet King Saul, with tambourines, with joy and with musical instruments.

esv.text: As they were coming home, when David returned from striking down the Philistine, the women came out of all the cities of Israel, singing and dancing, to meet King Saul, with tambourines, with songs of joy, and with musical instruments.

cnv.text: 大衛擊殺了那非利士人，與眾人一同回來的時候，婦女們從以色列各城裡出來，唱歌、跳舞、打鼓、歡呼、擊磬迎接掃羅王。

ccb.text: 大卫杀死了非利士人歌利亚，以色列人凯旋归来，妇女们击鼓弹琴、载歌载舞地从以色列各城出来迎接扫罗王。
